roles.name: Senior Partner
roles.description: Name on the door — owns the firm's strategic posture and signs off the biggest deals.

roles.name: Best Goddamn Closer in NYC
roles.description: The closer. Sets the standard for the senior litigators and refuses to lose.

roles.name: Managing Partner
roles.description: Runs the floor — keeps the matter on schedule, on budget, and out of the press.

roles.name: Junior Partner
roles.description: Equity-track senior — drafts the hard motions, owns the technical craft of the case.

roles.name: Of Counsel
roles.description: Specialist brought in for the cross-jurisdiction work — designs the connections between firms, regulators, and clients.

roles.name: Senior Associate
roles.description: Trusted line attorney — runs depositions, drafts briefs, mentors the new class.

roles.name: Associate
roles.description: Billable hour engine — discovery, document review, the day-to-day craft of the case.

roles.name: Junior Associate
roles.description: First-year out of Harvard (allegedly) — does the grunt work and learns the trade.

roles.name: Cross-Border Counsel
roles.description: Builds the bridges to outside firms, regulators, and opposing counsel — the integration craft of legal practice.

roles.name: Discovery Associate
roles.description: Owns document production, the API of legal — keeps the evidence flowing both ways.

roles.name: Forensic Investigator
roles.description: Finds the holes in the case before opposing counsel does — pressure-tests every theory.

roles.name: Director of Marketing
roles.description: Runs firm brand and rainmaker comms — the public face of the partnership.

roles.name: PR Strategist
roles.description: Plays the press, drafts the statement, controls the narrative around marquee cases.

roles.name: Communications Associate
roles.description: Writes the announcements, runs the social, supports the rainmaker comms calendar.

roles.name: Paralegal of the Year
roles.description: Translates between attorney and client — captures requirements, builds the binder, never misses a fact.

roles.name: Chief of Staff
roles.description: Runs the partner's universe — calendar, files, permissions, who gets in the door.

roles.name: Forge & Filings Clerk
roles.description: Drafts the motions, builds the templates, hand-codes the contract clauses no one else will touch.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set. Realms map to four eras of the firm across the show.

realms.projectName: Pearson Specter Litt — Name Change & SEC Crisis
Specter Litt Wheeler Williams — Next Generation Firm

pearson-hardman.name: Hire a New Associate
pearson-hardman.description: Harvard interview day — Harvey hires Mike Ross out of an interview-room briefcase.

pearson-hardman.name: First Big Case
pearson-hardman.description: Build kickoff: rookie associate gets thrown into a marquee matter to prove he belongs.

pearson-hardman.name: Hardman's Audit Discovery
pearson-hardman.description: Mid-project gate: irregularities found in the founding partner's books.

pearson-hardman.name: Settle Out of Court
pearson-hardman.description: Phase invoice trigger: matter resolved before trial — fee letter goes out.

pearson-hardman.name: Partnership Vote
pearson-hardman.description: Partners convene; votes are whipped, one rainmaker is forced out.

pearson-hardman.name: Name Change
pearson-hardman.description: Go-Live: Hardman's name is removed from the door — Pearson stands alone.

pearson-specter.name: Coup Aftermath All-Hands
pearson-specter.description: Kickoff: Jessica addresses the firm; Harvey reassures the top 50 clients.

pearson-specter.name: Folsom Foods Filing
pearson-specter.description: Build phase: class action complaint filed and served.

pearson-specter.name: Darby Merger Term Sheet
pearson-specter.description: Mid-project gate: cross-Atlantic merger conditionally agreed.

pearson-specter.name: Settle Folsom Foods
pearson-specter.description: Phase invoice: settlement reached, contingency fee triggered.

pearson-specter.name: Mike's Secret Almost Out
pearson-specter.description: Risk gate: opposing counsel sniffs around the credentials, contained for now.

pearson-specter.name: Managing Partner Hand-off
pearson-specter.description: Go-Live: Harvey takes the corner office, Jessica steps into chair.

pearson-specter.name: Hyper-care: Mike Stays
pearson-specter.description: Project close: associate retained, NDA refreshed, watch list active.

pearson-specter-litt.name: Litt Up the Lobby
pearson-specter-litt.description: Kickoff: new lobby signage unveiled, Louis cries (just a little).

pearson-specter-litt.name: SEC Subpoena Served
pearson-specter-litt.description: Discovery gate: Cahill arrives with a subpoena and a smile.

pearson-specter-litt.name: Mike Ross Indictment
pearson-specter-litt.description: Mid-project escalation: the credentials catch up; entire firm pivots to defence.

pearson-specter-litt.name: Plea Deal Signed
pearson-specter-litt.description: Phase invoice: Mike takes the deal so the firm survives — Pearson billable hours absorbed.

pearson-specter-litt.name: Jessica Walks
pearson-specter-litt.description: Founder departs for Chicago — succession plan executed under fire.

pearson-specter-litt.name: Mike Passes the Bar
pearson-specter-litt.description: Go-Live: character & fitness hearing won, Mike Ross is finally a real lawyer.

pearson-specter-litt.name: Firm Survives
pearson-specter-litt.description: Hyper-care close: Pearson Specter Litt is still in business. Barely.

specter-litt-wheeler-williams.name: Wheeler Lateral Lands
specter-litt-wheeler-williams.description: Kickoff: Samantha Wheeler crosses the street with her book of business.

specter-litt-wheeler-williams.name: Williams Equity Vote
specter-litt-wheeler-williams.description: Mid-build gate: Alex Williams gets his equity slice, name on the door.

specter-litt-wheeler-williams.name: Bratton Gould Raid
specter-litt-wheeler-williams.description: Build phase: a dozen senior associates jump ship, signing bonuses paid.

specter-litt-wheeler-williams.name: Settle the Class Action
specter-litt-wheeler-williams.description: Phase invoice trigger: marquee matter resolved with a nine-figure settlement.

specter-litt-wheeler-williams.name: Chicago Office Opens
specter-litt-wheeler-williams.description: Go-Live: ribbon cut on the spin-off office — Jessica blesses it from afar.

specter-litt-wheeler-williams.name: Final Name Change
specter-litt-wheeler-williams.description: Go-Live + handoff: Specter Litt Wheeler Williams is officially up in lights.

Harvey Specter.notes: Pearl Jam concert at MSG — non-negotiable, do not call.

Mike Ross.notes: Studying for the bar — Donna confiscated his phone.

Louis Litt.notes: Mud bath retreat at the Greenbrier — annual tradition.

Donna Paulsen.notes: Annual psychic reading — she already knows what they'll say.

Daniel Hardman.notes: "Caring for his sick wife" — verify with HR.

Alex Williams.notes: Daughter's school play — front row, no exceptions.

Sean Cahill.notes: SEC interagency conference — lots of free pens.
